title: Pride Craft
description: Adds a bunch of LGBT+ related items, blocks and more to Minecraft
body:
### **Note: The mod for Version's before 2.0.0 is made with Mcreator, please be warned** Adds a bunch of LGBT+ related items, blocks and more to Minecraft The Current Version only contains some LGBT+ flags but more are planned to be added in the future, if you have any recommended ones you can comment on the page and they may be added in the next major update. Armor Trims and Flag Material: Armor trims can be placed onto any armor including modded armor. By crafting the smithing template for the flag and using the flag material. Flag material is used to craft all blocks and items in this mod they are crafted using either wool or concrete of the color of the flag. Flag Blocks: Full Blocks that have the Flag on all Sides. Also has directional block faces. Flag Carpets: Carpets that have the Flag. Also has directional block faces. Mini Flags: Miniature Flags that can be placed in any direction. Wall Flags: Just simple 1x1 block flags that can be placed in any direction on a wall. Large Wall Flags: 1x2 block flags that can be placed in any direction on a wall.
